findings.location: s1 — first annotation equivalent code block
findings.description: The annotation equivalent for the first ValidationUtil example omits `@PropertyName("昼間連絡先電話番号")`. The source shows this annotation as part of the equivalent, but the knowledge file only shows `@Required` and `@JapaneseTelNumber`. Since the knowledge file explicitly claims the code block is equivalent to the annotation usage, the incomplete equivalent is misleading.

findings.location: s1 — second annotation equivalent code block
findings.description: The annotation equivalent for the second ValidationUtil example (prefectureCode / CodeValue) omits both `@PropertyName("都道府県")` and `@Required`. The source shows all three annotations as the equivalent, but the knowledge file only shows `@CodeValue(...)`. This makes the shown equivalent materially incomplete.

`@PropertyName` (as `PropertyName`) is absent from the hints array. It appears in both annotation-equivalent code blocks in the source and is a PascalCase class/annotation name that should be included.
findings.source_evidence: @PropertyName("昼間連絡先電話番号") ... @PropertyName("都道府県")
